name: SMBC
attribution: Saturday Morning Breakfast Cereal by Zach Weinersmith

comics.title: Proof
comics.alt: This sort of thing is why I will likely never write fantasy.

comics.title: Gland
comics.alt: If you disagree, find me a recent source specifically proving Descartes wrong.

comics.title: Speech
comics.alt: Just a reminder that I am available for commencement speeches, birthdays, and Bar Mitzvahs.

comics.title: Marshmallow
comics.alt: A note of appreciation to the 4 of you who started laughing on the first panel.

comics.title: Shorthand
comics.alt: SMBC will be at Davos this year, if someone at Davos looks at it on their phone.

comics.title: Prophecy
comics.alt: This is the actual plot of The Hobbit. The entire journey is meant to convince Frodo to just stay home ever after.

comics.title: Free
comics.alt: Really should've asked about the ship label before he got in.

comics.title: Debunking
comics.alt: I find cheese really good for when I have a stomach-wants-cheese, or when my head feels a little cheese-wanty.

comics.title: Meaning
comics.alt: Having a purpose was your first mistake. Wanting it to have meaning was a mental health calamity.

comics.title: AI
comics.alt: This is one of those jokes you make, then realize people in the field have probably been saying it verbatim for 20 years.

comics.title: Gates
comics.alt: You exist in a perpetual state of just about to get to Disney World.

comics.title: Bonzo
comics.alt: The hard thing about male clowns is you have to disbud them at a young age are they get dangerous.

comics.title: Cave
comics.alt: The worst part about being a caveman is people constantly yelling questions about seed oil and fermented foods when you're just trying to relax.

comics.title: Safe
comics.alt: The only annoying part is how the Ai keeps complimenting your blackmail skills instead of ruining the world.

comics.title: Ex
comics.alt: You've got to own that feeling, girl.

comics.title: Back
comics.alt: I want to be buried at the K-T boundary holding a box of brass gears marked Time Machine.

comics.title: Trash
comics.alt: Kicking myself for not teeing this up as a major kickstarter.

comics.title: Sick
comics.alt: Oddly enough, Ouroboros is also the sound a snake makes when trying to do this.

comics.title: Criminal
comics.alt: I'm so incredibly available to write this movie and 17 sequels. It's like the movie Wall Street, but with dolls.

comics.title: Experiencing
comics.alt: The flip side is once you get in the machine, you can start searching for the machine in the machine.
